scripts.copy-assets: cp ../assets/logo.svg ../assets/logo.png ../assets/logo-youtube.png ../assets/social-preview.png public/assets/ && cp ../docs/assets/*.gif ../docs/assets/*.png public/assets/ && mkdir -p public/assets/structured-view public/assets/web && cp ../docs/assets/structured-view/*.png public/assets/structured-view/ && cp ../docs/assets/web/*.png public/assets/web/
scripts.dev: npm run copy-assets && npm run sync-docs && astro dev
scripts.build: npm run copy-assets && npm run sync-docs && astro build
